description_long: This object is a large, flat-screen television with a sleek, modern design. The front features a wide, black display panel surrounded by a very thin bezel, giving it a minimalist appearance. The television stands on two angled legs positioned at either end, providing stability and a contemporary look. The back panel is slightly contoured with horizontal lines and a recessed area at the bottom, likely housing input/output ports and ventilation. The side views reveal the television's ultra-slim profile, emphasizing its lightweight and space-saving construction. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, with a predominantly black color scheme.
description: A large, slim, black flat-screen television with a thin bezel and two angled legs, featuring a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, black display panel with a thin bezel and two angled legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-slim profile and the depth of the television.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the contoured back panel with horizontal lines and a recessed area for ports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizing the slimness and the support legs.
attribute_bezel_design: Thin, black, plastic bezel with a minimalist, modern style.
